source_pr.title: planner: reset PhysicalWindow's schema for mpp plan.
source_pr.body:
Issue Number: close pingcap/tidb#34765

see https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/34765#issuecomment-1129558112 for more imformations


- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
before this pr: PhysicalWindow only has 3 output columns.
after his pr: PhyscialWindow has 5 output columns



```release-note
None
```

symptoms: tk.MustExec("explain select count(*) from (select row_number() over (partition by c1 order by c2) num from (select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.c4 = t2.b2) tem2 ) tx where num = 1;") (planner/core/window_push_down_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustExec("explain select count(*) from (select row_number() over (partition by c1 order by c2) num from (select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.c4 = t2.b2) tem2 ) tx where num = 1;") (planner/core/window_push_down_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustExec("explain select count(*) from (select row_number() over (partition by c1 order by c2) num from (select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.c4 = t2.b2) tem2 ) tx where num = 1;") (planner/core/window_push_down_test.go)
